description.value: Cost: 2 Requirements: Ability to weave, sufficient Energy Effect: Cast a multi-energy weave using Primary + Supporting Energy. Counts as ONE combat action for Multiple Action Penalty purposes (even though it costs 2 actions). See (Magic System) for full weaving rules Weaving Roll: Primary Potential + Primary Mastery + Supporting Potential + Supporting Mastery

system.effect: Cast a multi-energy weave using Primary + Supporting Energy. Counts as ONE combat action for Multiple Action Penalty purposes (even though it costs 2 actions). See (Magic System) for full weaving rules
system.special: Weaving Roll: Primary Potential + Primary Mastery + Supporting Potential + Supporting Mastery
